title: Nights of Azure 2: Bride of the New Moon / よるのないくに２ ～新月の花嫁～
Nights of Azure 2: Bride of the New Moon / よるのないくに２ ～新月の花嫁～

notes: The realtime aspects work perfectly well, but the pre-rendered cutscenes do not. Upon encountering them, the game will either crash or get stuck on a white screen(if you use native quartz). The Bronze rating here is technically accurate, but you simply cannot complete the game on Linux. You can't even see it in action unless you have a save fom after the intro cutscenes...
